CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-13-2002 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-12-2002 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Sep-17-02 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-28-2002 Continued To Jul-15-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk Nicole Olcomendy, Reporter D. Davenport.

Cause called for trial, matter has settled according to the following terms. Defendant will pay to plaintiff $7,500.00. Plaintiff will prepare a release, including any and all known and unknown liens. If the terms of the settlement are complied with the plaintiff will file a dismissal with prejudice. Each side to bear their own fees and costs.
